discrepancies.historical_claim: 81.9 percent core and 94 percent maximum scenario
discrepancies.artifact_result: 0.1 percent in four early offline snapshots, then 0.03 percent in seven later offline/fallback snapshots
discrepancies.resolution: Keep all values as historical model outputs; reject 81.9/94 as verified or current probabilities.
The trigger count lacks register evidence in this batch and is invalidated for current use.

discrepancies.historical_claim: Fully active, synchronized and ready for live execution
discrepancies.artifact_result: Execution status proves offline/demo output only; live run did not complete; DNS/source checks failed

discrepancies.historical_claim: Discrepancy, forecast, social and trigger tracking were operational
discrepancies.artifact_result: Four corresponding register CSVs contain headers only
discrepancies.resolution: Registry schemas exist; populated historical tracking is not proven.

discrepancies.historical_claim: Dated prices and metrics represented current live values
discrepancies.artifact_result: JSON explicitly labels prices offline demo or offline demo/fallback
discrepancies.resolution: Treat values as test fixtures only and require current official-source retrieval for future reports.

direct_token_demand_policy.rule: Network, payment, stablecoin, RWA, institutional, CBDC or application adoption does not automatically create direct XRP or HBAR token demand.

invalidation_rules: Invalidate live-status claims when source health fails or values are labelled demo/fallback.
Invalidate probability claims without reproducible model inputs, calibration and outcome testing.
Invalidate populated-register claims when the register contains only a header.
Invalidate completion claims when runtime, rollback and owner acceptance are absent.
Reverify all current legal, regulatory, market, company and adoption facts from official sources.
open_gaps: Complete request-to-response message-level lineage for all 22,672 text lines.
Process historical XRP/HBAR DOCX files not included in this bounded batch.
Create semantic duplicate and supersession groups across the full historical source universe.
Rebuild evidence-backed catalyst and trigger history from dated primary sources.
Populate forecast accuracy only after predictions and actual outcomes are linked.
Create current official-source update separately from historical reconciliation.
rollback: Supersede individual discrepancy resolutions only with new source-linked evidence; never delete the historical record.
